// DESCRIPTION: Customer-parameterizable configuration for the Drug Safety Signal Monitor demo.
// INSTRUCTIONS: Update these values to match the customer's therapeutic area, drug portfolio, and Fabric environment.

drug_filter.description: Primary drug to monitor (used by single-drug ingestion script). Use openFDA generic_name or brand_name fields.

drug_portfolio.description: Portfolio profile for multi-drug fetch. Options: mixed, cardiology, oncology, immunology. Or use --drugs CLI flag for custom list.
drug_portfolio.spike_description: Drug that will have a clustered 48h event spike to trigger DetectSafetySignals()

openfda_api.description: Register for a free API key at https://open.fda.gov/apis/authentication/ to increase rate limits.

fabric_eventhub.description: Connection string from Fabric Eventstream 'Custom endpoint' source. Navigate to Eventstream > Sources > Custom endpoint > Keys.

fabric_eventhouse.description: Eventhouse KQL database URI from Fabric workspace > Eventhouse > Query URI. Find it at: Workspace > Eventhouse > hover > Copy Query URI.

signal_detection.description: A signal is raised when the current 7-day count exceeds (spike_threshold_multiplier × 30-day rolling average) AND meets minimum_event_count. Lowered min to 3 for demo visibility.

alerting.description: Activator will send alerts via Teams adaptive card and email. Set cooldown to avoid alert fatigue.

streaming.description: Fabric Eventstream sample events must be <1MB. simulate_realtime=true replays historical data with injected ISO 8601 timestamps.

dashboard.description: Default parameters for Real-Time Dashboard tiles. Changed to 30d trend for demo data window and top 10 reactions for richer visuals.
